description_long: This object is a modern laptop computer with a sleek, black exterior and a standard clamshell design. The screen is open and displays a desktop interface with multiple application windows, including images and charts, indicating it is powered on and in use. The keyboard is a full QWERTY layout with a visible function row and a touchpad centered below the keys. The laptop's lid is plain except for a circular indentation or emblem in the center, but no brand logo is clearly visible. The chassis appears to be made primarily of plastic with some metallic elements, and the surface has a smooth, slightly glossy finish. No external ports or stickers are visible from the provided views.
description: A sleek, black laptop with an open screen displaying desktop content and a full QWERTY keyboard, featuring a smooth, glossy finish and a plain lid.
description_view_0: Side view showing two laptops, both open, with visible keyboards and screens; the thin profile and hinge design are apparent.
description_view_1: Front view showing the laptop's screen displaying desktop content and the full keyboard; the back of a second laptop is visible with a circular emblem on the lid.
description_view_2: Angled side view highlighting the open screens and keyboards of both laptops, emphasizing the slimness and hinge mechanism.
description_view_3: Front-angled view showing the screen content, keyboard, and the plain back of the second laptop with a circular emblem.
attribute_screen_state: The screen is open and powered on, displaying a desktop interface with multiple application windows and images.
attribute_keyboard_layout: QWERTY layout with a function row and standard keys; no numeric keypad is visible.
